# harvester_blockdevice (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Adopt and provision a block device for Longhorn storage
resource "harvester_blockdevice" "nvme_data" {
  name      = "blockdevice-pci-0000-04-00-0-abcdef123456"
  namespace = "longhorn-system"

  description = "NVMe data drive on node-01"

  tags = {
    role = "data"
  }

  labels = {
    tier = "fast"
  }

  # Provisioned = device is formatted and used by Longhorn
  provision = true

  # Force formatting even if the device has an existing filesystem
  # force_formatted = true
}

# Adopt a device without provisioning (monitoring only)
resource "harvester_blockdevice" "spare_disk" {
  name      = "blockdevice-pci-0000-05-00-0-fedcba654321"
  namespace = "longhorn-system"

  description = "Spare disk - not yet provisioned"

  provision = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `device_tags` (List of String) device tags for provisioner, e.g. ["default", "small", "ssd"]
- `disk_provisioner` (Block List, Max: 1) provisioner configuration for the block device (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--disk_provisioner))
- `force_formatted` (Boolean) force format the device to overwrite existing filesystem
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `provision` (Boolean) whether the device should be provisioned for storage
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `dev_path` (String) the device path of the disk, e.g. /dev/sda
- `device_status` (List of Object) device hardware and filesystem status (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_status))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `node_name` (String) name of the node to which the block device is attached
- `provision_phase` (String) provisioning phase: Provisioned, Unprovisioned, or Unprovisioning
- `state` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--disk_provisioner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner`

Optional:

- `longhorn` (Block List, Max: 1) Longhorn volume backend disk provisioner (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--disk_provisioner--longhorn))
- `lvm` (Block List, Max: 1) LVM volume backend disk provisioner (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--disk_provisioner--lvm))

<a id="nestedblock--disk_provisioner--longhorn"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner.longhorn`

Optional:

- `disk_driver` (String) disk driver for V2 data engine: auto or aio
- `engine_version` (String) engine version: LonghornV1 or LonghornV2


<a id="nestedblock--disk_provisioner--lvm"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner.lvm`

Required:

- `vg_name` (String) volume group name

Optional:

- `parameters` (List of String) additional LVM parameters



<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `default` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `read` (String)
- `update` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--device_status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `device_status`

Read-Only:

- `bus_path` (String)
- `capacity_size_bytes` (Number)
- `dev_path` (String)
- `device_type` (String)
- `drive_type` (String)
- `filesystem_type` (String)
- `is_read_only` (Boolean)
- `is_removable` (Boolean)
- `model` (String)
- `mount_point` (String)
- `parent_device` (String)
- `partitioned` (Boolean)
- `serial_number` (String)
- `storage_controller` (String)
- `vendor` (String)
- `wwn` (String)
